news.title: 6529 ~1 month old  Some of you know me from somewhere else  My views on NFTs in the thread below 1/ On How Short Life Is A few years ago, I was walking around in a blizzard in SoHo (New York). It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...

Lets talk about it ! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with wire fraud and money laundering, which both carry a maximum sentence of 20 years in prison So reporting to CI actually does work. Maybe we should send some more names their way. WAGMI Ledger co-founder and former CEO admits that governments can subpoena a...

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.

Crypto’s mascot. First time Joining ! LFG Show some loveee

In hindsight, the signs will have been obvious My big girl purchase btw Kind of exciting to get back into our eCom roots. We spent years building up our audience, demand, and social proof before seriously doubling down on CPG.
